title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules derived from studying how Anthropic engineers prompt Claude Code: prompt skills not the model itself, skills are more than prompts, build composable skills rather than custom ones, and skills improve with repeated sessions. The video offers practical patterns for using Claude effectively without requiring technical experience.
